steps.title: Apply the 29% increase to the 2012 figure
steps.content:
A 29% increase means the 2022 projection is 129% of the 2012 jobs:
$$113{,}000 \times 1.29 = 145{,}770$$

steps.title: Match to the closest choice
steps.content:
Among the four choices, 145,800 differs from 145,770 by only 30, far less than any other option.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
